LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret.label: ancient shielded turret
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret.description: A portable automatic turret with a ballistic shield in front of it. Requires steel to refurbish its barrel after heavy use. May explode when damaged. Its dumb AI brain can't be directly controlled, so beware of friendly fire. The ballistic shield is capable of deflecting some shots.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret_Bullet.label: mini-turret bullet
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret_Gun.label: ancient shielded turret
LanguageData.VQE_AncientShieldedTurret_Gun.descriptio: A simple automatic gun made to be mounted on a turret.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSpacerAutocannon.label: ancient spacer autocannon
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSpacerAutocannon.description: An ancient autocannon designed for ship-to-ship combat. It still appears to be functional. Its large-caliber shells do heavy damage over significant ranges.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSpacerAutocannon_Bullet.label: ancient spacer autocannon shell
LanguageData.VQE_AncientSpacerAutocannon_Gun.label: ancient spacer autocannon
LanguageData.VQE_AncientLandmine.label: ancient landmine
LanguageData.VQE_AncientLandmine.description: An ancient, high-explosive payload connected to a trigger which detonates on touch or bullet impact. Since it is hidden in the surrounding terrain, it cannot be placed adjacent to other traps. It’s impossible to detect it until triggered.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenLancer.label: frozen lancer
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenLancer.description: A frozen shell containing a lancer.\n\nLong-dormant mechanoids can become encased in ice, preserving them for years. Though inert, they remain alert, scanning for movement. Any disturbance, such as footsteps, explosions, or shifting ice, can trigger a sudden reboot, shattering their frozen shell. Nearby frozen mechanoids may awaken in unison.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCentipede.label: frozen centipede
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenCentipede.description: A frozen shell containing a centipede.\n\nLong-dormant mechanoids can become encased in ice, preserving them for years. Though inert, they remain alert, scanning for movement. Any disturbance, such as footsteps, explosions, or shifting ice, can trigger a sudden reboot, shattering their frozen shell. Nearby frozen mechanoids may awaken in unison.
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScyther.label: frozen scyther
LanguageData.VQE_FrozenScyther.description: A frozen shell containing a scyther.\n\nLong-dormant mechanoids can become encased in ice, preserving them for years. Though inert, they remain alert, scanning for movement. Any disturbance, such as footsteps, explosions, or shifting ice, can trigger a sudden reboot, shattering their frozen shell. Nearby frozen mechanoids may awaken in unison.
